topic: UNGA Venezuela resolution - historical precedents and CP
summary: Historical precedents show UNGA condemned Panama (9 days) and Grenada (8 days) but NOT Iraq 2003. CP dropped from 67% to 28% over Jan 7-10.
content:
Key findings:
1. US operation in Venezuela on Jan 3, 2026 - captured Maduro
2. UNSC emergency meeting Jan 5 - broad condemnation including allies (France, Denmark), but NO vote/resolution at UNSC
3. Historical precedents:
   - Grenada 1983: Invasion Oct 25 → UNGA Res 38/7 adopted Nov 2 (8 days), vote 108-9
   - Panama 1989: Invasion Dec 20 → UNGA Res 44/240 adopted Dec 29 (9 days)
   - Iraq 2003: NO UNGA condemnation despite massive opposition
4. CP trajectory: Started ~67% on Jan 7, dropped to ~28% by Jan 10-11
5. No evidence of draft UNGA resolution being circulated (8 days after operation)
6. BBC notes many countries agreed Maduro was illegitimate but condemned the method
7. Question deadline: February 1, 2026 (20 days remaining from today Jan 11)
